articles.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
articles.description: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Shade lands $14M to let creative teams search their video libraries in plain English
articles.description: Shade has its own filesystem that lets you "stream" files directly to your local drive
articles.author: Ivan Mehta
